title: How to auo fill a line in a board from an email sent to the board
excerpt:
I am trying to configure the autofill of a table in a board. 
When user fill out a form, it uses a formula to ask relevant questions, then it sends an email to a monday.com board. How can we autofil a table please from a…

posts.author: Jonathandataengineer (Jon Data Engineer)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to configure the autofill of a table in a board.
When user fill out a form, it uses a formula to ask relevant questions, then it sends an email to a monday.com board. How can we autofil a table please from an email?
I have sent two emails to a board using the monday.com email address for
the board.
Both emails have gone to the board neither email has autofilled or auto
created a table.
How can you set up an email contents to autofill a table please ?
I would like the first email to create and configure the table.
Then other emails sent to the table to auto fill the same table.

posts.author: Hodi (Hodi Haydarov)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m also trying to get my column values populated from email content sent to the board address. Is this achieavable?

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Try Extract Updates app. It was born to fill this monday platform gap.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Hodi see my answer here How to auo fill a line in a board from an email sent to the board - #3 by Nir-Jetpack
